articles.title: WNBA suspends Alyssa Thomas for hitting Caitlin Clark in the throat - CBS News
articles.description: No foul was initially called after Alyssa Thomas' fist made contact with Caitlin Clark's throat during a game between the Phoenix Mercury and Indiana Fever on Wednesday.
articles.content: The Phoenix Mercury's Alyssa Thomas has received a flagrant foul penalty and been suspended for one game after hitting Indiana Fever guard Caitlin Clark in the throat during a game Wednesday night, t… [+2583 chars]
